title: Organic Coconut Oil: Types, Uses & Benefits for Skin
meta_description: Discover what organic coconut oil is, the difference between virgin, refined, and cold pressed types, and how to use it for skin, hair, and oral care.
image_prompt: Product photography, a single open glass jar of organic virgin coconut oil as the clear hero of the scene, the jar filled with smooth white solid coconut oil and a small bamboo spatula resting across the rim, styled on a smooth white-oak wood tabletop with visible grain, accompanied by a halved fresh coconut shell showing the white flesh interior and a small clear glass bottle of organic jojoba oil as a secondary ingredient prop, warm golden morning side light from the left casting soft natural shadows, blurred soft green foliage bokeh background, photorealistic, 35mm lens, shot on Canon R5, wide landscape crop filling the full frame edge to edge, no letterboxing, no borders.
